name: ejentum-mcp
description: RAG augments knowledge. Ejentum augments reasoning. Four cognitive harnesses (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory) spanning 679 engineered abilities, matched per task and served as MCP tools. Each call returns a structured scaffold the LLM absorbs before its first token, catching the shortcuts that ship as confidently-wrong answers.
long_description: RAG augments knowledge. Ejentum augments reasoning. Four MCP tools (harness_reasoning, harness_code, harness_anti_deception, harness_memory) wrap the Ejentum Logic API, which retrieves the most-relevant cognitive operation from a catalog of 679 (Reasoning 311 / Code 128 / Anti-Deception 139 / Memory 101) per task. Each call returns a structured scaffold the calling LLM absorbs before its first token: a named failure pattern, a procedure to follow, suppression vectors that block the shortcut, a falsification test for self-checking. Catches sycophancy, hallucination, causal shortcuts, and reasoning decay at the moment they would otherwise emerge. Stdio transport, Bearer auth via EJENTUM_API_KEY, free tier 100 calls.

ejentum_api_key.title: Ejentum API Key
ejentum_api_key.description: Get one at https://ejentum.com/pricing (free tier: 100 calls). Stored locally; never sent anywhere except the Ejentum API.
